data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a 0.41% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 16, 2025, 13:44 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,699.25 USDT, with a narrowed 0.41% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Metalpha Reports Significant Revenue Growth And Announces Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: According to PANews, digital asset management firm Metalpha has released its latest unaudited financial performance report. The report reveals that for the six months ending September 30, 2024, the company achieved a total revenue of $19,720,654. This marks a nearly fourfold increase compared to the $5,085,150 recorded during the same period in the 2024 fiscal year. Additionally, Metalpha's board of directors has approved a stock buyback plan of up to $5 million, with the repurchase transactions set to occur over the next 36 months.

data.title: U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund Proposal Draws Attention Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, the Trump administration has recently proposed the establishment of a U.S. Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF) by 2026, suggesting TikTok as a potential investment target. This proposal has garnered significant attention as the U.S. faces economic challenges and a high fiscal deficit. While the idea appears appealing, analysts caution that without clear planning and governance mechanisms, the fund could pose more risks than benefits to the market and economy.

data.title: Trump Addresses Media Rumors About Musk
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump and Elon Musk were interviewed by Fox News on February 14. During the interview, Trump was asked about certain U.S. media outlets attempting to create division by referring to Musk as 'President Musk.' Trump expressed that he is accustomed to such tactics, noting that some individuals aim to drive a wedge between him and Musk by spreading similar rumors. However, he stated that these efforts have been unsuccessful, as he would not have been elected President if the media were effective in tarnishing his image. Musk, seated beside Trump, nodded in agreement with Trump's remarks.

SHELL rose to a maximum of $0.62, with a maximum increase of more than 40%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that due to the major update of MyShell AI agent framework ShellAgent, SHELL (MyShell) briefly broke through $0.6 and is now quoted at $0.55, up more than 40% in 24 hours. 
According to previous news, this update of ShellAgent includes: ShellAgent component protocol, IM integration and on-chain intelligence.

data.title: A certain whale/institution has recently accumulated 1.9 million OMs, with a floating profit of nearly 2 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a whale/institution has recently accumulated 1.9 million OM (worth approximately $14.45 million), with a current floating profit of $1.877 million.
This address has withdrawn OM from Binance in batches since January 19, 2025, with an average price of $6.62 (current price $7.62). During this period, 260,000 OM were transferred to a new address, but there was no token selling behavior.

data.title: Shaw: I am very much looking forward to v2 and will release an updated roadmap soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Shaw, the founder of ElizaOS (formerly ai16z), posted on X that the first phase of ElizaOS distribution has been opened to ai16z holders and ecosystem members. He is very much looking forward to version v2 and will release an updated roadmap soon.
